capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a network management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has a network management service.

questions.prompt: Is the network management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network management service is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Network Management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs for network management are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for network management

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Network Management reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network management KPIs and KRIs are reviewed at least quarterly.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise adopt an enterprise-wide formalized and documented process for network management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an enterprise-wide formalized documented network management process.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide formalized documented network management process

questions.prompt: Is the network management process automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network management process is automated.

questions.prompt: Is the network management process reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network management process is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the network management process align operations with zero-trust segmentation and micro-segmentation policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network management aligns with zero-trust segmentation
questions.evaluation_focus: Zero-trust segmentation alignment in network operations

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an NMS platform?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an NMS platform.

questions.prompt: Does the NMS platform manage network devices enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS platform manages network devices enterprise-wide.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise adopt automation features from the NMS platform like automated upgrades and remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise adopts NMS automation features such as automated upgrades and remediation.
questions.evaluation_focus: NMS automation features such as upgrades and remediation

questions.prompt: Is the NMS platform configuration reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS platform configuration is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the NMS platform integrate with other systems like configuration management, asset management, and policy management to provide contextual information and visibility into flows?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS integrates with configuration, asset, and policy management systems.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with configuration, asset, and policy management systems

questions.prompt: Does the network have capability to expand based on workload increase?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network can expand based on workload increase.
questions.evaluation_focus: Network expansion based on workload increase

questions.prompt: Can the entire network reach to increase in workload or is the capability restricted to a specific segment?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether scaling capability applies enterprise-wide or is restricted to a specific segment.

questions.prompt: Can the network expand capacity automatically or programmatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the network can expand capacity automatically or programmatically.

questions.prompt: Are the scaling configuration in the enterprise reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether scaling configuration is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process to plan and monitor the availability, quality, and adequate capacity of resources in order to deliver the required system performance as determined by the business?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has a formalized documented capacity planning process.

questions.prompt: Is the capacity management process reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the capacity management process is reviewed for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the NMS have full visibility of the network across all parts of the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS has full visibility of the network across all parts of the enterprise.
questions.evaluation_focus: Full enterprise-wide network visibility in NMS

questions.prompt: Does the NMS system have full visibility and correlation on faults occurring across the network?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS has full visibility and correlation of faults across the network.
questions.evaluation_focus: Full fault visibility and correlation across the network

questions.prompt: Does the NMS expose segmentation boundaries, trust zones, or policy enforcement context alongside topology visibility?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether NMS provides segmentation and trust-zone visibility
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation and trust-zone visibility in NMS

questions.prompt: Does the NMS have capability to create and manage users who can access the NMS and view the dashboard?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS can create and manage users for dashboard access.
questions.evaluation_focus: NMS user creation and management for dashboard access

questions.prompt: Does the NMS system deploy mechanisms like SNMP, Syslog, etc. to monitor health of the network devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the NMS deploys SNMP, Syslog, and similar mechanisms to monitor network device health.
questions.evaluation_focus: SNMP, Syslog, and similar monitoring mechanisms

questions.prompt: Are all the network devices enterprise-wide monitored by the NMS system?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all network devices enterprise-wide are monitored by the NMS.
